login.description: Log in to use your library, wishlist, and seller dashboard.

meta.title: Log in · PromptMarket
meta.description: Log in to access your library and seller dashboard.

register.description: Just an email and a username. The moment you join, your library, wishlist, and seller dashboard are all ready.
register.usernameHintPrefix: Used as-is in your profile URL: /users/
register.terms: By signing up, you agree to PromptMarket's seller terms and privacy policy.

meta.title: Sign up · PromptMarket
meta.description: It only takes seconds. Join PromptMarket and make the most of the catalog.

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
password.tooLong: Password must be 72 characters or fewer.

username.tooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
username.tooLong: Username must be 20 characters or fewer.
username.format: Username can only use letters, numbers, and underscores.

panel.browsePrefix: Feel free to look around, or jump
